name: Technical Leadership
description: Lead technical direction for a team-level initiative, make clear trade-offs, and guide engineers through design reviews.

name: Stakeholder Influence
description: Translate technical decisions into business impact and align product, engineering, and leadership stakeholders.

name: System Design
description: Design reliable, scalable services with explicit trade-offs around performance, cost, security, and maintainability.

name: Mentoring
description: Coach junior engineers through feedback, code review, pairing, and growth-oriented delegation.

name: Execution Ownership
description: Own delivery from discovery to rollout, manage risks early, and communicate progress with measurable outcomes.
